zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Bassingbourne於大約1308年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾特朗平頓時，他的父親Warin Baldwin de Bassingbourne34歲，母親Rosemund Hoo31歲。他於1327年與Joan le Frauncis在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1397年在英國坎布利其爾多丁頓享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Bassingbourne于大约1308年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾特朗平頓时，他的父亲Warin Baldwin de Bassingbourne34岁，母亲Rosemund Hoo31岁。他于1327年与Joan le Frauncis在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1397年在英国坎布利其爾多丁頓享年90岁。

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Bassingbourne was born about 1308, in Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Warin Baldwin de Bassingbourne, was 34 and his mother, Rosemund Hoo, was 31. He married Joan le Frauncis in 1327, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1397, in Doddington, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Bassingbourne est né environ 1308, à Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Warin Baldwin de Bassingbourne, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Rosemund Hoo, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Joan le Frauncis en 1327, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1397, à Doddington, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Bassingbourne um 1308 in Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Warin Baldwin de Bassingbourne 34 und seine Mutter Rosemund Hoo 31. Er hat 1327 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Joan le Frauncis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1397 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Doddington, Cambridgeshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bassingbourne è nato il circa 1308 nel Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Warin Baldwin de Bassingbourne, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Rosemund Hoo, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Joan le Frauncis nel 1327, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1397, nel Doddington, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Bassingbourneが約1308年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアトルンパントンで生まれた時，父Warin Baldwin de Bassingbourneは34歳，母Rosemund Hooは31歳であった。1327年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジでJoan le Frauncisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1397年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアドッドイントンで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Bassingbourne(이)가 대략 1308년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 트럼핀그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Warin Baldwin de Bassingbourne(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Rosemund Hoo(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1327년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 Joan le Frauncis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1397년 영국 캄브리지실르 도딩턴에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Bassingbourne nasceu aproximadamente 1308, em Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Warin Baldwin de Bassingbourne, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Rosemund Hoo, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan le Frauncis em 1327, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1397, em Doddington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Bassingbourne родился около 1308 г. в местности трумпингтон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Warin Baldwin de Bassingbourne было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Rosemund Hoo, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan le Frauncis в 1327 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1397 г. в местности доддингтон, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Bassingbourne nació aproximadamente 1308, en Trumpington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Warin Baldwin de Bassingbourne, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Rosemund Hoo, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Joan le Frauncis en 1327, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1397, en Doddington, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 90 años.
